inclusions: Mixtures of two or more of the products of the same heading (09.04 to 09.10) are classified in that heading
Mixtures of two or more of the products of different headings (from 09.04 to 09.10) are classified in heading 09.10

exclusions.condition: The item is EXPLICITLY described as a 'mixed condiment' or 'mixed seasoning', OR it is explicitly stated that it has LOST the essential character of spices from 09.04-09.10. CRITICAL: DO NOT apply this exclusion to simple mixtures of spices which belong in 09.10.
Cubeb pepper (Piper cubeba) or other products of heading 12.11
